component.name: Agnostric (Jumble fork)
component.summary: A user-friendly Nostr client for exploring relay feeds

description.p: Agnostric (Jumble fork) is a Nostr client for exploring relay feeds, following people, reading notes, and publishing from a desktop-style app.

developer.name: Max Parfeniuk - Agnostric, Cody Tseng - Jumble
